meta.what: Issued Dingo Cards — who holds one, which card they land on, and the passcode that opens the front door (login.html).
meta.note: Light access-gate, not security; real auth = Phase 5 Firebase. Passcodes are plain text on purpose — this is a front door with a doorbell, not a lock. Direct URLs still work; the guard banner on every page says what is simulated.
meta.doctrine: People are ISSUED Dingo cards. They sign in, they land on THEIR card — the back engine stays hidden.

roles.caller: Dingo Caller — lands on their card; nav reduces to My Card · My Promises · Take the walk · Sign out
roles.admin: ALL-ACCESS — full 14-page nav, the whole engine room
roles.guest: sample view — same reduced nav, on the reference card
